message:
🚀 Release v2.0.0-alpha.128 - Build Optimization & Memory Coordination

- Fixed build issues by removing 32 UI files
- Validated MCP memory coordination features
- Updated all core agents with MCP tools
- Created 5 new hive-mind agents
- Tested and verified all CLI commands
- Published to npm as claude-flow@alpha
